mapper.sql: id, student_id, bed_id, room_id, building_id, check_in_date, check_out_date, status, assigned_by, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: insert into dorm_assignment (student_id, bed_id, room_id, building_id, check_in_date, check_out_date, status, assigned_by, remark, created_at, updated_at) values (#{studentId}, #{bedId}, #{roomId}, #{buildingId}, #{checkInDate}, #{checkOutDate}, #{status}, #{assignedBy}, #{remark}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select from dorm_assignment where student_id = #{studentId} and status = 'LIVING' limit 1
mapper.update: update dorm_assignment set status = 'CHECKED_OUT', check_out_date = #{checkOutDate}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id} and status = 'LIVING'
mapper.select: select a.id, a.student_id, s.student_name, a.bed_id, bed.bed_no, a.room_id, r.room_no, a.building_id, b.building_name, a.check_in_date, a.check_out_date, a.status, a.assigned_by, a.remark, a.created_at from dorm_assignment a left join student s on s.id = a.student_id left join dorm_bed bed on bed.id = a.bed_id left join dorm_room r on r.id = a.room_id left join dorm_building b on b.id = a.building_id where a.student_id = #{studentId} and a.status = 'LIVING' limit 1
